steps.title: Test the listed inputs
steps.content:
Use the equation
$$y=-4x+40$$
and substitute the $x$-values shown in the tables.

steps.title: Compute the matching outputs
steps.content: For $x=0$, the equation gives $y=-4(0)+40=40$. For $x=1$, it gives $y=-4(1)+40=36$. For $x=2$, it gives $y=-4(2)+40=32$. The table with outputs $40$, $36$, and $32$ matches the equation. The answer is C.
